the weight for this module. CONFIRMED against INEI: any-insurance coverage 2024 = 90.69% vs official 90.7%. NOTE this is NOT the same weight as module 03, which needs factora07 — the correct weight changes by module.

EsSalud. CODING MOVED WHILE THE NAME DID NOT — exact history from INEI's own value labels (perudata.dictionary.changed_codes): 2004 labels only '1=seguro integral de salud'; 2007-2011 use '0=pase, 1=si'; from 2012 it is '1=si, 2=no'. So 'no' is 0 in the early years and 2 today. Testing == 1 is correct in EVERY year; testing == 2 or != 1 is silently wrong before 2012.

ANY health insurance. THE ANCHOR: 90.69% in 2024 vs INEI's published 90.7% (weight_health, habitual residents). Built from == 1, so it is correct across the coding change (0/1 before 2012, 1/2 after).

permanent limitation (moving/walking, seeing, speaking, hearing, understanding, relating) — the short Washington Group set. INEI value labels: 1=Si, 2=No. ABSENT BEFORE 2014, so it resolves to an all-NA column in earlier years and is MARKED in the coverage report.

reported a symptom or illness in the last 4 weeks. INEI value labels: 0=Pase (not applicable), 1=Sintoma o malestar (tos, dolor de cabeza, fiebre, nausea). This is the universe for the care-seeking questions.
